name: MediarrGuard
description: Detects corrupt or unplayable media files and automatically requests replacements from Sonarr and Radarr. Features reactive playback failure detection, proactive ffprobe integrity scanning, user notifications, and automatic library refresh.
overview: Automatic corrupt media detection and re-download via Sonarr/Radarr

versions.changelog: Initial release with reactive monitoring, proactive scanning, user notifications, and automatic library refresh.
